POST restapi/learningtool/searchdata/v1

Request Information

URI Parameters

None.

Body Parameters

Itslearning.RestApi.Client.Requests.SearchDataItslearningRequest
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CustomerId

integer

None.
ElementIds

Collection of integer

None.
SearchData

string

None.

Request Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "CustomerId": 1,
  "ElementIds": [
    1,
    2
  ],
  "SearchData": "sample string 2"
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<SearchDataItslearningRequest xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Client.Requests">
  <CustomerId>1</CustomerId>
  <ElementIds xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
    <d2p1:int>1</d2p1:int>
    <d2p1:int>2</d2p1:int>
  </ElementIds>
  <SearchData>sample string 2</SearchData>
</SearchDataItslearningRequest>

application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Sample: 
No sample available

Response Information

Resource Description

None.
